entity.label: Lois
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: The maternal grandmother of Timothy. She is commended by Paul for her faith (2 Tim. 1:5).

nodes.label: Lois
nodes.description: The maternal grandmother of Timothy. She is commended by Paul for her faith (2 Tim. 1:5).

verses.text: When I call to remembrance the unfeigned faith that is in thee, which dwelt first in thy grandmother Lois, and thy mother Eunice; and I am persuaded that in thee also.
